summary: Iteration 66: Verified three new soccer prediction improvement systems - Game Tempo Estimation, Favorite Dampening, and Cross-Team Possession Contradiction Warning. All 22 pytest tests passed. Code exists at specified locations and logging is properly configured.
critical_code_review_comments: Game Tempo Estimation code verified at lines 843-914 in predict.py - initializes game_tempo dict, calculates expected total goals, classifies tempo (high/low/normal), applies tempoMultiplier
Favorite Dampening code verified at lines 917-942 in predict.py - applies to pass props when team odds < 1.60, calculates dampeningFactor

Cross-Team Possession Contradiction warning verified at lines 150-170 in picks.py - returns POSSESSION_CONTRADICTION type with CRITICAL severity when saving same-direction pass props for opposing teams
Bayesian prompt anchor includes [GAME TEMPO WARNING] and [HEAVY FAVORITE ALERT] context injection at lines 1048-1062
Post-fusion scaling verified at lines 2190-2234 - applies tempo scaling and favorite dampening to final projectedValue
Note: The 'quarter' reference in predict.py (line 1850) is for 'quarter-final' in soccer knockout rounds, not basketball
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified three new prediction improvement systems: (1) Game Tempo Estimation - calculates expected total goals from team/opponent GPG, classifies as high/normal/low tempo, applies tempoMultiplier to pass props. High tempo (>=3.2 goals) boosts passes, low tempo (<=1.8 goals) suppresses. (2) Favorite Dampening - when team odds < 1.60, applies dampeningFactor to OVER pass predictions (heavy favorites manage games, reduce tempo). (3) Cross-Team Possession Contradiction - /api/picks/save returns correlationWarnings with POSSESSION_CONTRADICTION type when user saves same-direction pass props for opposing teams (zero-sum alert). All code paths verified via static analysis. Note: [GAME TEMPO] and [FAVORITE DAMPENING] logs only appear when real team/opponent IDs are provided (not in AI-only mode with teamId=0).

game_tempo_estimation.post_fusion: POST-FUSION GAME TEMPO SCALING at lines 2190-2208

possession_contradiction_warning.message: ZERO-SUM ALERT: Possession is zero-sum — if one team passes less, the other passes MORE

no_basketball_references.predict_py: No basketball/nba/wnba/pts_reb_ast references (quarter is for quarter-final)
